content_hash.captured_at: begin_tx() stores as content_hash_at_begin on waiver row; sign_tx() re-verifies against document
content_hash.note: Any code that populates document.content_hash (e.g. a template editor) MUST use this same scheme: sha256(body + 0x0A + signature + 0x0A + footer). A mismatch causes all subsequent sign attempts against that template to fail.

signed_document_hash.note: Binds the signature to the signing context. The unix_timestamp is Utc::now().timestamp() captured in Rust (not MySQL DEFAULT) and bound to both the waiver_audit_sign INSERT and this hash computation.

waiver.role: Signed waiver instance — the core legal record

columns.signature_data: Typed name / SVG / base64 (the signature itself, set at sign step)
columns.signed_document_hash: SHA-256 of signing context: content_hash + signature_data + IP + timestamp (set at sign step)
columns.content_hash_at_begin: SHA-256 of document content captured at begin step, re-verified at sign step
columns.address_street: Signer street address (captured at begin step)
columns.address_zip: Signer zip code (captured at begin step)
columns.emergency_contact_name: Emergency contact full name (captured at begin step)
columns.emergency_contact_phone: Emergency contact phone (captured at begin step)
columns.emergency_contact_relationship: Relationship to signer (captured at begin step)
columns.timestamp: Creation time (mapped as created_at in Rust)
columns.expires_at: Draft expiry — begin_tx() sets to now + 24h; sweeper deletes expired drafts

waiver_status.role: Lookup table for waiver lifecycle states
waiver_status.lifecycle: begin → Draft(0) → sign → Pending(1) → staff accept → Accepted(2). Archived(3) reserved for future use. Paper waivers (create_paper_tx) skip directly to Accepted(2) — the physical paper is the legal artifact.

waiver_collection.role: Groups waivers per booking — tracks collection completeness

waiver_document_map.role: Junction: waiver ↔ waiver_collection (attaches waiver to booking)

document.role: Immutable waiver template — what the signer was shown

columns.uuid: CHAR(16), non-guessable public identifier for pre-sign retrieval
columns.content_hash: SHA-256 hex of composed template (integrity proof)

document.issue: RESTRICT prevents DELETE but not UPDATE of components. Mitigated by verify_signed_document() on retrieval.

document_status.role: Lookup table for document lifecycle states

waiver_audit.role: Parent audit record — one per discrete event, groups IP/UA with the event subtable row
waiver_audit.esign_requirement: §7001(d) Record retention, FRE 901 Chain of custody

waiver_audit_confirm_success.role: Historical — produced by pre-refactor batch flow only. New waivers do not create rows here.

columns.timestamp: DATETIME (explicit Rust-side Utc::now(), not MySQL DEFAULT)

workflow_integration.gate_expression: waiver_count >= N (auto-condition step in workflow definition)
